summary: Iteration 54: AI Designer Photo-Generate EMERGENCY FIX Testing. Verified GPT-4o Vision step + gpt-image-1 generation endpoint. Backend: 6/6 core tests passed. Frontend: 10/10 UI checks passed.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 during testing (ingress/network issue, not code bug)

issues: Login modal blocks interaction for non-authenticated users - expected behavior per requirements

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate - validates all room types (bathroom, kitchen, living_room, bedroom, corridor, balcony)
✅ POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate - accepts multiple photos (photo1, photo2, photo3)
✅ Generate button shows EUR price ('ГЕНЕРИРАЙ 3D — 69 EUR')
✅ /ai-designer route also loads same component correctly
✅ Full flow takes 30-90 seconds per image (expected)
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GPT-4o Vision analysis step added before gpt-image-1 generation
✅ Vision prompt correctly identifies room type, elements, colors, layout, camera angle
✅ Room-specific prompt generated using vision analysis results
✅ Render prompt includes detected room type in CRITICAL section to prevent mismatch
✅ Error handling present for each photo processing step
✅ Budget generation with 3 tiers and Bulgarian store links
seed_data_creation: None - tests use generated test images
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 verified the EMERGENCY FIX for AI Designer: 1) POST /api/ai-designer/photo-generate now uses GPT-4o Vision to analyze each uploaded photo BEFORE generating 3D render with gpt-image-1. 2) Vision step extracts: room_type, elements_visible, colors, layout_description, camera_angle. 3) This analysis is used to create room-specific prompt for accurate generation (e.g., bathroom photo → bathroom render). 4) Frontend /room-scan and /ai-designer both use AIDesignerPage component with proper data-testids. 5) AI generation takes 30-90 seconds per image - timeout handling needed in tests. 6) Endpoint is multipart/form-data (use -F flags, not JSON).

photo_generate_endpoint.details: Accepts multipart/form-data with photo1 (required), photo2/photo3 (optional), room_type, style, budget_eur

vision_analysis_step.details: GPT-4o Vision analyzes each photo before generation - code verified in lines 2684-2726

image_generation_step.details: gpt-image-1 generates 3D render using room-specific prompt from vision analysis

my_projects_endpoint.details: Returns 401 without auth, requires valid JWT token

frontend_room_scan_ui.details: All UI elements present: packages, room type, style, photo grid, generate button

room_type_options.details: Supports: bathroom, kitchen, living_room, bedroom, corridor, balcony, stairs, facade, other
